page.title: Projects
page.subtitle: Manage and open each project workspace.

quota.atLimit: You have reached the maximum allowed projects ({current} / {limit}). You cannot create more until an administrator increases the limit.
quota.nearLimit: You are approaching the project limit ({current} / {limit}). Once reached, you will not be able to create more until an administrator increases the quota.

filters.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, client, or status...

empty.title: No projects found
empty.description: Adjust the filter or create a new project to get started.

tooltip.healthy: Approximate signal from status, planned dates, open tickets, and open tasks. No strong risk flags.
tooltip.watch: Some pressure detected—review dates, open tickets, or task backlog.
tooltip.at_risk: Strong risk signals: blocked or overdue plan, or elevated open tickets/tasks. Worth a closer look.

signals.title: Executive signals
signals.subtitle: Health, delivery risk, load, open work, and progress — in one glance.
signals.caption: Heuristic view from data already in this workspace (not a forecast).
signals.teamLoadHelper: {n} teammate(s) near or over comfortable load

load.title: Team load & capacity
load.subtitle: Assigned open work per member (display-only scoring).
load.summaryManyHot: {n} people are near or above comfortable load.
load.summaryTwoHot: Two teammates are carrying elevated load.
load.summaryConcentrated: Workload is concentrated across top assignees.

risks.title: Risks & bottlenecks
risks.subtitle: Executive watchlist — escalations worth a decision.
risks.caption: Generated from overdue work, blocks, tickets, load, and plan window.

recent.title: Recent activity
recent.subtitle: Latest events tied to this project.
recent.empty: No recent events for this project yet.
recent.fallbackHint: Jump into modules to create movement.

sapito.title: Ask Sapito about this project
sapito.subtitle: Project copilot grounded in this workspace — pick a prompt or open the assistant.
sapito.promptFocus: What should I focus on this week?
sapito.footnote: Replies run when you send a message in the assistant.

insight.progressing: Trajectory looks workable — keep execution tight and visible.
insight.pressure: Progress is possible, but execution pressure is rising — prioritize blockers, dates, and load.
insight.at_risk: Status is fragile — unresolved blockers, overload, or timeline stress need leadership attention.

panels.tasksSubtitle: Overdue and blocked first, then active work by due date.
panels.ticketsSubtitle: Unresolved items — prioritize older open tickets.

notes.title: Project notes
notes.subtitle: Operational notes and functional memory for this project.

empty.title: No notes in this project yet
empty.description: Capture incidents, solutions, decisions, and operational context.

delete.title: Delete note
delete.body: Are you sure you want to delete this note? This action cannot be undone.

globalAccess.title: Global role access.
globalAccess.body: You have admin access to this project without being a team member.

addMember.title: Add member
addMember.help: If the user exists, they are added immediately. Otherwise a pending invitation is created.
addMember.atLimit: You reached the member limit for this project ({current} / {limit}).

invitation.linkHelp: Copy or open the link so the user can accept the invitation.

pendingInvites.title: Pending invitations
pendingInvites.subtitle: Invited users who have not accepted yet.
pendingInvites.maxReached: - Maximum reached. You cannot create more invitations until limit is increased.
pendingInvites.noneHelp: If email belongs to registered user, they are added directly and do not appear here.

teamMembers.title: Team members
teamMembers.subtitle: Only explicit project memberships are shown here.
teamMembers.empty: No members in this project yet.

success.alreadyMember: User already belongs to this project.
success.directAdd: User existed and was added directly to the team.
success.inviteSent: Pending invitation created and email sent.
success.inviteNoEmailWithLink: Invitation created, but email failed. Use invitation link.

errors.noPermission: You do not have permission to manage members.
errors.quotaReached: You have reached this project's limit ({current} / {limit}).
errors.projectQuotaReached: This project has reached the maximum members allowed ({current} / {limit}).
errors.unexpectedResponse: Unexpected server response. Please try again.
errors.cannotRemoveLastOwner: Cannot remove the last project owner.
